commits: 3274dc5e (over-fetch 4x on best-fallback for geometry filter headroom)
remediation_cycle_1.diagnosis: Fix was logically correct but insufficient — did not address the geometryStatus filter or the 20-mile nearest distance cap.

remediation_cycle_2.root_cause_verified_by_orchestrator: top-20 by composite_score have geometryStatus ABSENT (undefined); they predate the Sprint 02 geometry-backfill. The strict === 'generated' filter excluded them all.
remediation_cycle_2.additional_root_cause_discovered_by_impl: When location RESOLVES (sim SLC), Mode 2 (nearest) applies a 20-mile server-side distance cap (MAX_NEAREST_CURATED_ROUTE_DISTANCE_MI=20 in convex/curatedRoutes.ts:125). ZERO curated routes exist within 20mi of SLC. The query returns empty -> isEmpty=true -> 'No nearby routes' text instead of pills. This is independent of the geometryStatus filter.
fix_applied: Filter relaxation at hooks/use-curated-discovery.ts: changed .filter(r => r.geometryStatus === 'generated') to .filter(r => r.geometryStatus !== 'unresolved' && r.geometryStatus !== 'failed'). This lets ABSENT/null geometryStatus routes through (graceful degradation per AC-4) while still hiding known-bad states.

Nearest-empty->best fallback: added useState(fellBackToBestFromEmptyNearest) + useEffect that detects when the nearest query returns 0 passable routes and latches a fallback to sort='best'. This surfaces the catalog's top-quality routes (Cherohala Skyway, Wasatch Ridge Traverse, etc.) when no routes exist within 20mi of the user.
remediation_cycle_2.step_3_status_after_fix: FAIL (route-on-map-marker not visible after tapping a suggestion pill — the tapped route may lack geometry polyline for map plotting; AC-4 graceful degradation says '1 polyline OR 1 centroid pin' but STEP 3 asserts route-on-map-marker)

remediation_cycle_3.trigger: Backend geometry backfill commit 50d2a4e6 — Cherohala Skyway (routeId: motorcycleroads:cherohala-skyway) now has geometryStatus='generated' in curated_routes table.

code_path_verified.createCuratedRoutePlan_mutation: convex/db/routePlans.ts:477 — fetches geometry from curated_route_geometry side table by routeId (line 506-509)
code_path_verified.buildCuratedPlanMap: convex/db/routePlans.ts:431-456 — decodes polyline from geometry.value via polyline.decode(geometry.value, precision), returns overviewGeometry with bounds
code_path_verified.suggestion_pill_onPress: components/chat/chat-input.tsx:131-132 — calls onSelectRoute(routeId) for curated routes

remediation_cycle_3.step_3_status: STILL_FAIL — route-on-map-marker not visible after tapping suggestion pill. GEOMETRY DATA EXISTS but route does not render on map.
remediation_cycle_3.run_7_hypothesis_disproved: Run-7 hypothesized 'the tapped route (Cherohala Skyway with geometryStatus=ABSENT) lacks a generated geometry polyline'. Run-8 DISPROVES this: Cherohala Skyway now has geometryStatus='generated' AND the geometry doc exists in the side table with a valid encoded polyline. The failure is NOT in the data.
suspected_remaining_causes: The routeId passed from the suggestion pill may not match 'motorcycleroads:cherohala-skyway' (the geometry table key) — possible _id vs routeId mismatch
The createCuratedRoutePlan mutation may fail silently — clearKeychain:true may invalidate the Clerk session, causing requireIdentity() to throw
The map component may not render route-on-map-marker even when the route plan is created — possible client-side rendering issue
No runtime errors captured in Metro console/error buffer — but Maestro cold-start (clearState+clearKeychain) may have reset the CDP session, losing error capture

step_results.evidence: App launched, dev-server picker shown, tapped localhost:8081 to connect, dev-menu popup dismissed, login screen reached.
Tapped e2e-test-login-button; signed in via Clerk dev-keys.
id:chat-input visible; id:route-on-map-marker NOT visible; text 'Discover' NOT visible.
Drawer opened; only Settings/Saved nav entries; no Plan-a-ride/Discover; no Filter/Sort/State on home.

id:discovery-suggestion-pill-.* is visible. FIRST TIME PASSING after 7 Maestro runs. The fix (filter relaxation + nearest-empty->best fallback) surfaced the catalog's top-quality routes (Cherohala Skyway, Wasatch Ridge Traverse, etc.) as suggestion pills. Screenshot 05-suggestion-cards-copper-road-icon captured.
step_results.root_cause_chain: 1. Top-by-score routes have geometryStatus=ABSENT (predate Sprint 02 backfill) -> strict === 'generated' filter excluded them. 2. When location resolves to SLC, Mode 2 nearest returns empty (no routes within 20mi) -> pills never rendered. Fix: relaxed filter + nearest-empty->best fallback.

step_results.evidence: Run-8 (post-backfill): Tapped discovery-suggestion-pill-.* successfully. route-on-map-marker did NOT appear within 30s. CONVEX REPL VERIFIED: Cherohala Skyway has geometryStatus='generated' AND a geometry doc exists in curated_route_geometry side table (routeId=motorcycleroads:cherohala-skyway, encoding=google_encoded_polyline, value=encoded polyline string). The createCuratedPlan mutation code (routePlans.ts:506-509) fetches this geometry and buildCuratedPlanMap (routePlans.ts:431-456) decodes it. The data is correct; the failure is in the client-side rendering or mutation execution path. No Metro console errors captured (CDP session may have been reset by clearState+clearKeychain).
step_results.run_7_hypothesis_disproved: Run-7 suspected ABSENT geometry was the cause. Run-8 confirms geometry EXISTS but route still doesn't plot.
